title: Eight killed after drone hits bus in Russia-controlled part of Ukraine
summary_full: The bus was travelling between Moscow and Simferopol, in Russian-controlled Crimea, an official says.
summary_public: The bus was travelling between Moscow and Simferopol, in Russian-controlled Crimea, an official says.
